children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the President to carry out the provisions of sections 7704 and 7705 of this title (in addition to any authorizations for similar purposes included in other Acts and the authorizations set forth in subsections (b) and (c) of this section), not to exceed $1,000,000 for the fiscal year ending , not to exceed $2,000,000 for the fiscal year ending , and not to exceed $2,000,000 for the fiscal year ending .1See References in Text note below.1September 30, 1978September 30, 1979September 30, 1980

To enable the Foundation to carry out responsibilities that may be assigned to it under this chapter, there are authorized to be appropriated to the Foundation not to exceed $27,500,000 for the fiscal year ending ; not to exceed $35,000,000 for the fiscal year ending ; not to exceed $40,000,000 for the fiscal year ending ; $26,600,000 for the fiscal year ending ; $27,150,000 for the fiscal year ending ; $25,000,000 for the fiscal year ending ; $25,800,000 for the fiscal year ending ; $28,665,000 for the fiscal year ending $27,760,000 for the fiscal year ending ; $29,009,000 for the fiscal year ending ; $28,235,000 for the fiscal year ending ; $31,634,000 for the fiscal year ending ; $38,454,000 for the fiscal year ending . Of the amounts authorized for Engineering under section 101(d)(1)(B) of the National Science Foundation Authorization Act of 1988, $24,000,000 is authorized for carrying out this chapter for the fiscal year ending , and of the amounts authorized for Geosciences under section 101(d)(1)(D) of the National Science Foundation Authorization Act of 1988, $13,000,000 is authorized for carrying out this chapter for the fiscal year ending . Of the amounts authorized for Research and Related Activities under section 101(e)(1) of the National Science Foundation Authorization Act of 1988, $29,000,000 is authorized for engineering research under this chapter, and $14,750,000 is authorized for geosciences research under this chapter, for the fiscal year ending . Of the amounts authorized for Research and Related Activities under section 101(f)(1) of the National Science Foundation Authorization Act of 1988, $34,500,000 is authorized for engineering research under this chapter, and $17,500,000 is authorized for geosciences research under this chapter, for the fiscal year ending .
